title: The Will Makes The Work; Or, Consent Makes The Cure.
content:
No grief is grown so desperate, but the ill
    Is half way cured if the party will.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "The Will Makes The Work; Or, Consent Makes The Cure."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
